page_content:
LBSC - Library Science

LBSC208 Special Topics in Information Studies (3 Credits) Special topics in aspects of information use, technology, and policy. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

LBSC386 Experiential Learning (3-6 Credits)

Restriction: Junior standing or higher; and must have learning proposal approved by the Office of Experiential Learning Programs, faculty sponsor, and student's internship sponsor.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
